tasks.title: Test Claude Opus 4.6's 1M Token Context Window
tasks.title_cn: 测试Claude Opus 4.6的100万Token上下文窗口
tasks.description: Test the new 1-million-token context window with Agent Teams feature. Try processing a large codebase and document the performance improvements.
tasks.description_cn: 测试新的100万token上下文窗口和Agent Teams功能。尝试处理大型代码库并记录性能改进。
tasks.source_cn: Anthropic 博客 - Claude Opus 4.6 发布

tasks.title: Learn GPT-5.3 Codex Lazy-Loading Feature
tasks.description: Study the new lazy-loading context feature that saves 40% tokens on large codebases. Compare performance with previous versions.
tasks.description_cn: 学习新的懒加载上下文功能，该功能可在大型代码库上节省40%的token。与之前版本比较性能。

tasks.title: Analyze Anthropic's $350B Valuation
tasks.description: Research the implications of Anthropic's Series F funding at $350B valuation. Compare with OpenAI's valuation and analyze market trends.
tasks.description_cn: 研究Anthropic以3500亿估值进行F轮融资的影响。与OpenAI估值比较并分析市场趋势。
tasks.source: The Investor Standard - AI Funding Landscape 2026
tasks.source_cn: 投资者标准 - 2026年AI融资格局

tasks.title: Test Alibaba's AI Business Assistant
tasks.title_cn: 测试阿里巴巴AI商业助手
tasks.description: Try the AI assistant for multilingual content creation in cross-border e-commerce. Test with 30,000 SMEs reporting 37% increase in overseas exposure.
tasks.description_cn: 试用阿里巴巴AI商业助手进行跨境电商多语言内容创作。测试已有3万中小企业使用并报告海外曝光度增加37%的功能。
tasks.source: Hangzhou Government - AI Cross-Border E-commerce Initiative
tasks.source_cn: 杭州市政府 - AI跨境电商倡议

tasks.title: Explore AI Video Generation Trends
tasks.description: Investigate the tools and technologies behind 75% of marketing videos being AI-generated. Research real-time generation capabilities.
tasks.description_cn: 调研75%营销视频AI生成背后的工具和技术。研究实时生成功能。
tasks.source: ABB Takk TV - Musk's AI Content Prediction
tasks.source_cn: ABB Takk TV - 马斯克AI内容预测

tasks.title: Try Cursor 0.45 Multi-line Auto-complete
tasks.description: Test the new real-time multi-line auto-complete features in Cursor 0.45 with Claude-Opus-4.6 support. Document the user experience.
tasks.description_cn: 测试Cursor 0.45中新的实时多行自动完成功能，支持Claude-Opus-4.6。记录用户体验。

tasks.title: Research AMD vs NVIDIA AI Hardware
tasks.title_cn: 研究AMD vs NVIDIA AI硬件
tasks.description: Compare AMD MI-350X with 288GB HBM3e memory versus NVIDIA Blackwell delays. Analyze the competitive landscape in AI hardware.
tasks.description_cn: 比较AMD MI-350X（288GB HBM3e内存）与NVIDIA Blackwell延期。分析AI硬件竞争格局。
tasks.source: Mean CEO Blog - AI Hardware News February 2026
tasks.source_cn: Mean CEO博客 - 2026年2月AI硬件新闻

tasks.title: Write Reflection on AI Content Creation Future
tasks.title_cn: 撰写AI内容创作未来反思
tasks.description: Write a brief analysis on Elon Musk's prediction that 90% of digital content will be AI-generated by 2026. Consider implications for creators and businesses.
tasks.description_cn: 撰写关于埃隆·马斯克预测到2026年90%数字内容将由AI生成的简要分析。考虑对创作者和企业的影响。
tasks.source: ABB Takk TV - Elon Musk AI Content Prediction
tasks.source_cn: ABB Takk TV - 埃隆·马斯克AI内容预测
